---
title: "Past Trainings"
format: html
anchor-sections: false
---

CoastWatch has offered satellite data trainings for many years in both in-person and online formats. These workshops have supported NOAA scientists, resource managers, and students in learning how to access, analyze, and apply satellite data in their work.

Below are selected past trainings with dedicated pages that include agendas, materials, or additional information.

## Trainings with available pages

### 2026
- [NOAA CoastWatch/PacIOOS Satellite and Ocean Data Training Course](pgrsc26.qmd)

### 2025
- [Satellite and Animal Telemetry Data Training](icft25.qmd)
- [Long Island Sound Class](longislandsound25.qmd)

### 2024
- [NOAA CoastWatch/PacIOOS Satellite and Ocean Data Training Course](pgrsc24.qmd)
- [PolarWatch Sea Ice Training](seaice24.qmd)
- [American Fisheries Society Satellite and Animal Telemetry Data Training](afs24.qmd)

## Historical training archive

The trainings below are included as part of the CoastWatch training history. Dedicated pages or public materials may not be available for these sessions, but they reflect the long-standing scope of the program and the range of communities it has served.

| Date   | Location |
|--------|----------|
| 4/2020 | USGS Anchorage, Online, AK |
| 2/2020 | University of Puerto Rico, San Juan, PR |
| 9/2019 | Texas A&amp;M, Galveston, TX |
| 8/2018 | University of Washington, Seattle, WA |
| 8/2017 | University of Washington, Seattle, WA |
| 8/2016 | University of Washington, Seattle, WA |
| 8/2015 | University of Washington, Seattle, WA |
| 8/2014 | University of Washington, Seattle, WA |
| 8/2013 | Oregon State University, Corvallis, OR |
| 3/2012 | NOS Coastal Services, Charleston, SC |
| 3/2011 | Oregon State University, Corvallis, OR |
| 8/2010 | Peninsula College, Monterey, CA |
| 8/2009 | Peninsula College, Monterey, CA |
| 3/2008 | Oregon State University, Corvallis, OR |
| 3/2007 | Oregon State University, Corvalli, OR |
| 8/2006 | Oregon State University, Corvallis, OR |
